decision.reason: GATE 2a FAIL (proposed slice is 'rescue_concentrated', not a fair battlefield — rescue-concentrated is an upper bound, the W102 anti-pattern); GATE 2b FAIL (an authoritative fair broad-slice multi-seed Phase 3 verdict already exists for this class — a cheaper re-run cannot overturn it); GATE 2c FAIL (clean true magnitude miss: executor clean, audit passes, per-seed majority positive, MLB-2 healthy — no confound to fix) ⇒ accept the bounded single-class claim on meta/llama-3.3-70b-instruct; $0 NIM.
